name: Quillr
absorption_note: Httpora absorbed into Quillr as httpora-core crate 2026-06-20 (#28). Two products: @kooshapari/quillts (TS) + httpora-core (Rust Tower middleware).
rationale: Canonical HTTP toolkit boundary. Provides rate-limit/retry/circuit-breaker middleware for cross-repo consumption (Eventra outbox, Authvault audit forwarder, Configra remote sync).
ci_state: 4/14 main runs fail (Quality Gate + sast + security-deep-scan)
